meta.name: Support Ticket Classifier
meta.description: Receive support tickets via webhook, classify by category, urgency, and sentiment, route to the right queue, and log to a tracker sheet.

parameters.content:
## 31 — Support Ticket Classifier

Receive tickets via webhook and get instant classification.

**Required:** OpenAI API, TICKET_SHEET_ID (to log), SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Integrations:** Hook this webhook URL into Intercom, Zendesk, or Typeform to auto-classify incoming tickets.

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ticket_id: body.id || `tkt_${Date.now()}`, subject: body.subject || body.title || '', body: (body.body || body.description || body.text || '').slice(0, 3000), customer_email: body.customer_email || body.email || '', customer_segment: body.segment || '', created_at: body.created_at || new Date().toISOString() } }];

values.content: Classify support tickets quickly and accurately. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 🚨 CRITICAL Ticket: {{ $json.subject }} [{{ $json.category }}]
